form.searchGenerators: Search by name, category, output, or use case...

builder.addFieldHint: Add a generator field from the catalog or the selector above.

uuid.name: UUID
uuid.summary: Generate RFC-style unique identifiers for primary keys and related IDs.

string.name: String
string.summary: Generate bounded random strings for names, tags, and free-form values.

integer.name: Integer
integer.summary: Generate integer values for counters, quantities, and numeric dimensions.

decimal.name: Decimal
decimal.summary: Generate decimal numbers for prices, measurements, and ratios.

boolean.name: Boolean
boolean.summary: Generate true/false values for flags and status columns.

date.name: Date
date.summary: Generate calendar dates within an optional range.

timestamp.name: Timestamp
timestamp.summary: Generate precise timestamps for event streams and audit records.

name.name: Name
name.summary: Generate realistic human names for customer or employee datasets.

email.name: Email
email.summary: Generate email addresses for account and contact datasets.

phone.name: Phone
phone.summary: Generate phone numbers for contact records.

idcard.name: ID Card
idcard.summary: Generate ID card-like values for regulated test datasets.

address.name: Address
address.summary: Generate postal addresses with cities, streets, and regions.

bankcard.name: Bank Card
bankcard.summary: Generate bank card-like numbers for non-production testing.

ip.name: IP Address
ip.summary: Generate IPv4 or IPv6 addresses for network datasets.

mac.name: MAC Address
mac.summary: Generate hardware address values for device inventories.

url.name: URL
url.summary: Generate URLs for crawlers, analytics, and content datasets.

domain.name: Domain
domain.summary: Generate domain names for accounts, DNS, and web test data.

company.name: Company
company.summary: Generate company names for CRM and B2B datasets.

vehicle.name: Vehicle
vehicle.summary: Generate vehicle identifiers and model-like values.

yaml.name: YAML
yaml.summary: Generate YAML fragments for configuration-oriented test cases.
